title: Tetra's Weapons
description: Adds 3 new weapon types and throwing stars.
body:
Adds 3 new weapon types and throwing stars.

## Anchors

Deal far more damage but in return attack much slower.
![Iron anchor crafting recipe. There is a chain in the bottom middle, an iron ingot above that and an iron block above the ingot. to either side of the block is iron ingots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/983c411ebb36e17fb8e9264e1b3ec6784d72c3e5.png)

## Sickles

Attack much faster but deal less damage in return![Iron sickle crafting recipie. It has a stick in the middle bottom, an iron ingot above that with another iron ingot diagonally above that one.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f856d3d4377ea22e586d38813c5fef6d58b12360.png)

## War Fans

Attack slower and deal less damage, but on right click boosts you into the air.
![Iron War Fan recipe. it has paper in the middle, a stick under it and iron ingots to either side of it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76dec2a1e6dee31c4946c1c21e2571e20104753c.png)

## Throwing Stars

A throwable projectile that deals minor damage but can be thrown quickly.
![Throwing Star recipe. It has four iron nuggets surrounding the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/889a02225b5c05a10cd009ad6e95694df4b9086a.png)
